---
title: "Introduction to Quarto"
format: html
editor: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---

Markdown formatting

# header 1

## header 2

###### header 6

*italic text*

**bold text**

**my ordered list** 1. one 2. two 3. three + 3A + 3B + 3C

# Block quote

Here is the quote intro 
> I took the road less traveled  
> And that has made all the distance

# Table here

| Col1  | Col2    |
|-------|---------|
| hi    | bye     |
| hello | goodbye |
